chapters.title: Convex vs Nonconvex Optimization
chapters.transcript: Convex functions have one global minimum. Nonconvex have local minima. Deep learning loss surfaces are nonconvex.

chapters.title: Gradient Descent Variants
chapters.transcript: Batch, mini-batch, SGD. Momentum, Nesterov, AdaGrad, RMSprop, Adam.

chapters.title: Constrained Optimization
chapters.transcript: Lagrange multipliers, KKT conditions. Linear programming. Support vector machines use constrained optimization.

chapters.title: Second-order Methods
chapters.transcript: Newton's method, Quasi-Newton (BFGS), L-BFGS. Faster but more memory.

chapters.title: Stochastic Optimization
chapters.transcript: SGD with variance reduction. SVRG, SAGA. Coordinate descent.
